name: Sesame Fish
recipeInstructions:
If fish fillets are large, cut into 4 serving pieces.
Sprinkle both sides with salt. Heat butter and oil in a 10-inch skillet over medium heat until hot. Cook the fish about 10 minutes, carefully turning once, until brown on both sides. Remove the fish and keep warm. Cook and stir sesame seeds in the same skillet over medium heat for about 5 minutes, or until golden-brown; remove from heat. Squeeze lemon over sesame seeds. Stir in basil. Pour over fish. Sprinkle with parsley.
